query: SELECT o.deliveryPersonId, u.name, COUNT(*) as orderCount FROM orders o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.deliveryPersonId = u.id WHERE o.status = 'delivered' GROUP BY o.deliveryPersonId, u.name
